name: ​Synup
highlight_text: ​Best Suited For: Mid-sized Marketing & Advertising Agencies
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Source: Synup

​What Synup Does

Synup OS is a full growth engine. Most CRMs tell you who the client is, but Synup tells you how the client is doing. It pulls together sales, onboarding, billing, and fulfillment into one dashboard.

​The biggest differentiator is that Synup gives you white-label marketing apps (Listings, Reviews, Social) that you can hand over to your clients. You can literally offer your own “agency-branded” app suite to your local businesses at no extra cost, making you look like an enterprise-level firm while keeping your overhead rock-bottom.

​Key Features

​🏆 White-Label Client Portal & Reporting: Give every client a portal with your logo where tasks, files, and reports live together.

🏆 Lead Acquisition & Prospecting: In addition to upgrading your post-lad workflows, you also get to pull your prospecting efforts onto the same tool. Access a database of over 40 million business contacts with 150+ filters (industry, location, SEO gaps, etc.) to identify and acquire high-intent leads.

🏆 Sales Pipeline & CRM: Track leads, deals, tasks, and communications within a unified sales pipeline. It includes features like email integration, activity reminders, and a detailed customer activity timeline.

🏆 The Client Table Command Center: A filterable grid where you can see every location, their health score, and which services are active. 

🏆 Automated Invoicing & Payments: A flexible, agency-ready payment system that supports global gateways like Stripe and PayPal, along with automated one-time, split, or recurring invoicing. You can also customize your invoices to boost professionalism.

🏆 Integrated Fulfillment: Push local listing updates or manage reputation across Google and Yelp directly from the OS.

🏆 Churn Forecasting: Predictive insights that flag “at-risk” accounts based on performance data. 

🏆 Sales Pipeline & CRM: Track leads, deals, tasks, and communications within a unified sales pipeline. It includes features like email integration, activity reminders, and a detailed customer activity timeline.

​Source: Synup

What Makes Synup The Best Vcita Alternative

​Synup solves the scalability problem. While Vcita forces you to build “manual bridges” between your sales and your work, Synup integrates them. Plus, the ability to white-label the entire experience means you are building equity in your own brand, not someone else's.

​Benefits of using Synup

  • ​Stop Agency Churn: By seeing live performance metrics alongside client data, your account managers can be proactive instead of reactive.
  • ​Scale Without Bloat: Automate the repetitive drudge work of onboarding so your team can handle 3x the client load without burning out.
  • ​Increased Per-Client Revenue: Easily upsell new services (like reputation management or social posting) because the tools are already built into the platform you are already using.
  • Real-Time Client Insights: Operate with a single source of truth for every client. You’ll get access to a dashboard with a complete, up-to-date view of every client. This includes payment information, engagement, risk factors, and more. This lets you identify opportunities to upsell, improve, or even pull back.
  • Track Your Work: Store all client interaction data, calendar events, tasks, check-ins, and due dates in one intuitive view. This keeps every team member aligned and provides smart reminders so nothing gets missed.

​Pros

​✅ Full white-labeling for portals and mobile apps.

✅ Unified dashboard for both agency ops and client fulfillment.

✅ Built-in predictive analytics to spot churn early.

​Cons

​🚫 Likely too much “horsepower” for a solo freelancer with 2 to 3 clients.
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“I love how Synup brings together effortless listings updates, review management, and local page creation in one clean, centralized platform—saving time and boosting local visibility. It was surprisingly easy to implement and get started with, even without a dedicated technical team. Their customer support team is also incredibly responsive and helpful whenever I have questions or need assistance.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
